description: T-S K5, 16-40. Exercises of children, representing leters in various combinations and copies of the beginnings of the third and the first books of Moses. (Information from Goitein's note cards) Leaves from a children’s Hebrew textbook. Alphabetical writing exercises on P1. Passage from Leviticus 1:5-8 with Tiberian vocalisation on P2. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: דפים מספר לימוד עברי לילדים: תרגילי אלפבית ו-ויקרא א:5-8 עם ניקוד טברני
